visual_base.visual_narrative_log: (1) Two young women sit in a brightly lit indoor environment, likely a food court. The woman on the left wears a dark blue Kangol beret and a white knit vest, while the woman on the right has long black hair and a beige cardigan. A large Costco Wholesale logo is overlaid at the top of the frame. (2) The camera cuts to a close-up of a Costco food menu board. It displays a bowl of Japanese Oden priced at 99 NTD. The image on the board shows various fish cakes, a radish, and a meatball in broth. (3) A very brief shot shows a staff member's arms wearing blue sanitary gloves. They are seen reaching into a large metallic cooking vat, presumably preparing the oden for customers. (4) A close-up shot focuses on a white paper cup filled with oden broth. Visible inside are pieces of radish, chikuwa (tubular fish cake), and chopped green onions floating on the surface. (5) Back to the two women. The one in the beret uses a metal fork to spear a translucent piece of radish from the cup. She holds it up to the camera while smiling and speaking enthusiastically. (6) A series of rapid cuts shows different ingredients being lifted out of the cup one by one: first a long chikuwa, then small round shrimp paste balls, followed by a large, pale, circular stuffed tofu pouch. (7) The woman in the beret spears a large, greyish meatball (gongwan) and shows it to the camera. The woman on the right points to it as they discuss the size and texture. (8) The montage continues with close-ups of half-slices of fried fish cake (tenpura) and a square-shaped white fish cake being displayed on the fork. The lighting is consistent and bright throughout. (9) The scene shifts to the women tasting the broth. They both drink from the cup and react with pleasant facial expressions, nodding and looking at each other in agreement about the flavor. (10) The woman in the beret takes a large bite of the stuffed tofu pouch. Her eyes widen in a 'surprised' expression to indicate a good taste, while the other woman covers her mouth in a similar reaction. (11) Final shot shows both women giving a thumbs-up gesture towards the camera. The woman in the beret holds the fork up. Variety-style text '及格' with stars appears in the center of the frame.
visual_base.text_narrative_log: (1) [Logo]: COSTCO WHOLESALE. [Subtitle]: 好市多現在也有. (2) [Variety]: 好吃嗎? 好市多 關東煮 99元. (3) [Subtitle]: 一杯是99塊. (4) [Subtitle]: 我們來看看料有什麼. (5) [Subtitle]: 首先有蘿蔔. (6) [Subtitle]: 半塊的蘿蔔. (7) [Subtitle]: 兩個半截的竹輪. (8) [Subtitle]: 兩塊蝦滑. (9) [Subtitle]: 一個超大的包包. (10) [Subtitle]: 貢丸也給的很大顆. [Slogan]: 他寫台灣豬肉. (11) [Subtitle]: 兩個半片的甜不辣. (12) [Subtitle]: 跟一個正方形的魚板. (13) [Subtitle]: 然後她的湯超香的. [Subtitle]: 因為有非常多的小芹菜. [Subtitle]: 還加了一些芹菜碎. [Subtitle]: 很用心哦. (14) [Subtitle]: 來吃看看蘿蔔. (15) [Subtitle]: 覺得湯頭很好喝哎. (16) [Subtitle]: 因為它這個蘿蔔有. [Variety]: 吸飽湯汁. (17) [Subtitle]: 雖然它沒有浸泡到很久. [Subtitle]: 但是蘿蔔還是有點硬硬脆脆的. [Subtitle]: 可是它的湯頭喝起來好療癒哦. (18) [Subtitle]: 它湯喝起來跟那個超商關東煮差不多. [Slogan]: 但是因為它多了芹菜! (19) [Subtitle]: 所以又更好喝. [Subtitle]: 蘿蔔的香甜也有燉進去. [Subtitle]: 它的湯頭我喜歡. (20) [Subtitle]: 來試試這個大包包. (21) [Subtitle]: 嗯 這個好好吃哦. [Variety]: 好好吃. (22) [Subtitle]: 有點像嫩豆腐的口感. [Subtitle]: 嗯 好香. (23) [Subtitle]: 豬肉貢丸很誠意超大顆. (24) [Subtitle]: 貢丸好吃. [Subtitle]: 應該是他們有在賣的那一種. (25) [Subtitle]: 我覺得他的料給的很多. [Subtitle]: 所以這99塊其實是OK的. [Subtitle]: 兩個人分也綽綽有餘. [Variety]: 及格. [Subtitle]: 所以這個我是給及格可以試試看. (26) [Subtitle]: 自己給7.5分.

visual_human_presence.countingEvidence: 2 main female creators appearing throughout the review.
visual_human_presence.mainCharacterDescription: One woman wearing a blue Kangol beret and a white knit vest; the other with long dark hair wearing a beige knit cardigan.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: A typical Costco food court interior with grey tiled walls and illuminated menu boards.

audio_base.audio_narrative_log: (1) The audio begins with a high-pitched female voice speaking at a fast rate with energetic prosody. An upbeat, major-mode synthesizer-driven BGM plays underneath. A sharp 'pop' sound effect coincides with the appearance of visual branding. (2) As the price is mentioned, a high-frequency 'ding' bell sound effect is heard. The narrator's voice has a friendly quality with clear articulation and wide pitch variability. The BGM beat remains prominent throughout the intro. (3) During the ingredient showcase, multiple short 'pop' and 'bubble' sound effects are used to punctuate the mention of each food item. Each SFX has a high spectral centroid, creating a bright and busy acoustic atmosphere. (4) A 'whoosh' transition sound occurs as the shot changes to a close-up of the soup. The vocal intensity increases slightly as the speaker expresses excitement. Background ambient noise is minimal, suggesting a clean field recording. (5) Faint incidental sounds of a fork clinking against the paper cup and the liquid being stirred are audible. The BGM remains constant in tempo, around 128 BPM, providing a steady rhythmic foundation for the narration. (6) Vocal arousal reaches a peak during the tasting, characterized by rising intonation and exclamatory vocal sounds. A 'sparkle' SFX plays during the final verdict, followed by a quick fade-out of the music track.

narrative_and_purpose.narrativeStructure: Linear: Hook -> Product Intro -> Feature Breakdown -> Tasting Experience -> Final Verdict
narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: To review the new Japanese Oden product at Costco Taiwan. The creators methodically showcase the ingredients and provide a personal evaluation of the flavor and value for money.

endorsement_analysis.endorsementCues: Personal opinion and scoring shared without explicit sponsorship markers or 'paid partnership' labels.

high_inference.freeDescribe: A highly energetic short-form food review that utilizes fast editing and stylized sound effects to maintain viewer engagement.
